title: Update 5 - Orbit Salvager Native Release & Shop Expansion
notes: Orbit Salvager promoted from browser prototype to standalone native Tauri desktop app with sector objectives, combo progression, and boss encounters.
Shop expanded with eight mini-games across multiple genres (puzzle, strategy, arcade, word games) and real 11MB game content.
PowerShell game scripts now support interactive Windows Forms UI with fixed display modes.
Install flow improvements: first installs use default library directly, preferences consistently honored across all install actions.
All embedded games populated with real assets (music, graphics, levels, audio effects) instead of padding.
Android schema and build infrastructure scaffolded for future mobile releases.
